---
title: &TITLE Mattia Piccinini
last: Piccinini
first: Mattia
people_group: "external"
external: true
email: mattia.piccinini@tum.de
education:
  - Ph.D. in Autonomous Systems (summa cum laude) | University of Trento | 2024 <br> M.Sc. in Mechatronics Engineering (summa cum laude) | University of Trento | 2019 <br> B.Sc. in Industrial Engineering (summa cum laude) | University of Trento | 2017
subtitle: "Humboldt Post-doctoral Fellow, Technical University of Munich"
description: ""
affiliation: Technical University of Munich
image: avatar.jpg
listing:
  id: pubs
  template: ../../_ejs/publications.ejs
  contents:
    - "../../../publications/**/*.qmd"
    - "!../../../publications/_template/"
  sort: "pub_number desc"
  filter-ui: true
  include:
    author: *TITLE
  fields: [publication, title, categories, image, date, author]
page-layout: full
about:
  id: about
  template: trestles
  image-shape: round
  image: avatar.jpg
  links:
    - icon: envelope
      text: Email
      href: mailto:mattia.piccinini@tum.de
    - text: Google Scholar
      icon: mortarboard
      href: https://scholar.google.com/citations?user=xtgKwEoAAAAJ&hl=it&authuser=1
    - icon: github
      text: GitHub
      href: https://github.com/mattiapiccinini95
    - icon: globe2
      text: Website
      href: https://mattiapiccinini95.github.io
---

<hr>

:::{#about}

I am a Humboldt Post-doctoral Fellow at the [Autonomous Vehicle Systems (AVS) Lab](https://www.mos.ed.tum.de/en/avs/home/), Technical University of Munich (TUM), Germany.

My research lies at the intersection of **robotics**, **machine learning**, and **control**. I develop algorithms for real-time trajectory planning, control, and estimation of autonomous robots in uncertain, dynamic environments. I like to integrate prior knowledge of the robot dynamics into learning-based methods, such as neural networks, to enhance their **generalization to unseen scenarios** with minimal training data.

A 3-minute video presentation of my Ph.D. research is available [here](https://youtu.be/sdoO9i480ZY).

## Education
{{< meta education >}}

<br>

:::

## {{< meta first >}}'s Group Publications

:::{#pubs}
:::
